raw_brief: Mercado Libre private label sourcing run focused on women's fashion. Priority category: dresses (vestidos mujer). Also cover: athleisure, casual wear, beachwear, lounge. Markets: MX primary, AR secondary. Use case: private label and white label. Model: Shein-style small-batch testing with fast iteration. Key requirement: translate social trend signals (TikTok + Instagram) into concrete SKU recommendations with assortment specs. For each trend: capture what users like AND what they complain about — turn complaints into product opportunities. Surface early demand signals (pre-transaction) from TikTok and Instagram that haven't yet saturated MercadoLibre listings. Competitor tracking: identify dominant sellers in each subcategory. SKU recommendations must be concrete: fabric, cut, color palette, target price point.
